title: Jason Hall
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Jason|more=Hall}}
{{Image|person}}
'''Jason Hall''' wrote nine stories for ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'', two stories for [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']], and the four [[Hasbro Inc.|Hasbro]]/[[Toys "R" Us]]–exclusive comics for [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|Episode II]].

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
*''[[Star Wars Tales]]''
**"[[A Wookiee Scorned!]]"
**"[[The Princess Leia Diaries]]"
**"[[Children of the Force (comic story)|Children of the Force]]"
**"[[The Emperor's Court]]"
**"[[Sandstorm (comic story)|Sandstorm]]"
**"[[The Other (comic story)|The Other]]"
**"[[Dark Journey (comic story)|Dark Journey]]"
**"[[Being Boba Fett]]"
**"[[Storyteller (comic story)|Storyteller]]"

*[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']]
**"[[One of a Kind (comic story)|One of a Kind]]"
**[[Chain of Command (comic story)|''Chain of Command'']]

*[[Hasbro Inc.|Hasbro]]/[[Toys "R" Us]]–exclusive comics
**"[[Full of Surprises]]"
**"[[Most Precious Weapon]]"
**"[[Practice Makes Perfect (comic book)|Practice Makes Perfect]]"
**"[[Machines of War]]"

*[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 2: Dark Encounters|''Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 2: Dark Encounters - Introduction'']]
